dedupe_policy: publisher + article_id + title + product_or_device_scope + error_signature_if_any + source_url + canonical_id

records.title: Camera doesn't work in Windows
records.error_signature_if_any: Camera or webcam does not work in Windows
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows camera/webcam troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Microsoft article and supported Windows contexts; not user-verified.

records.title: Fix sound or audio problems in Windows
records.error_signature_if_any: Sound or audio problem in Windows
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows sound/audio problems.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Microsoft article and supported Windows contexts; not a device-specific fix.

records.title: Fix audio issues when no sound plays from speakers or headphones in Windows
records.error_signature_if_any: No sound from speakers or wired headphones
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for no-sound output troubleshooting in Windows.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; not proof of root cause without device context.

records.title: Fix missing or undetected audio output device in Windows
records.error_signature_if_any: Missing or undetected audio output device
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for missing/undetected Windows audio output devices.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; manufacturer driver guidance remains device-specific.

records.title: Camera app shows error 0xA00F4244 NoCamerasAreAttached
records.claim_supported: Official Microsoft Support article for Windows Camera app error 0xA00F4244.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to matching error signature; not a hardware confirmation.

records.title: If your Mac doesn't turn on
records.error_signature_if_any: Mac does not turn on or appears to show blank screen
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for Mac power-on/startup troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article steps; hardware service may be required.

records.title: If your Mac doesn't start up all the way
records.error_signature_if_any: Mac starts to a startup screen/symbol instead of completing startup
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for Mac startup screens and incomplete startup.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text and linked Apple startup states.

records.title: If your Mac starts up to a question mark
records.error_signature_if_any: Mac flashing question mark at startup
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for Mac startup question-mark symptom.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to matching startup symptom and Apple guidance.

records.title: If your Mac starts up to an Apple logo or progress bar
records.error_signature_if_any: Mac stuck at Apple logo or progress bar
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for Apple-logo/progress-bar startup issue.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article text; not proof of storage or OS root cause.

records.title: If your Mac starts up to a circle with a line through it
records.error_signature_if_any: Prohibitory symbol / circle with line at startup
records.claim_supported: Official Apple Support article for Mac prohibitory startup symbol.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to matching symbol and Apple guidance.

records.title: Fix internet connection problems on Android devices
records.error_signature_if_any: Android Wi-Fi or mobile data connection problem
records.claim_supported: Official Android Help article for Android internet connection problems.
records.limitations: Settings names vary by device manufacturer and Android version.

records.title: Fix a Pixel phone that won't charge or turn on
records.error_signature_if_any: Won't turn on; black/blank screen; won't charge; turns off immediately
records.claim_supported: Official Pixel Phone Help article for Pixel power and charging symptoms.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Pixel phones and article symptoms; not a battery or board diagnosis.

records.title: Fix battery drain problem
records.claim_supported: Official Pixel Phone Help article for battery drain troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Pixel battery-drain context; battery health and apps vary by device.

records.title: Websites don't load - troubleshoot and fix error messages
records.error_signature_if_any: Websites do not load or show connection/loading error messages
records.claim_supported: Official Mozilla Support article for Firefox website-loading troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to article symptoms and Firefox context; not network-wide proof.

records.title: Firefox hangs or is not responding - How to fix
records.error_signature_if_any: Firefox hangs or is not responding
records.claim_supported: Official Mozilla Support article for Firefox hang/not-responding troubleshooting.
records.limitations: Scope-limited to Firefox article context; external security software/app interactions require local validation.
